title: 8oz Ripple Black Disposable Coffee Cups – Insulated Triple Wall Cups for Hot Drinks, Takeaway. Pack of 50
features: TRIPLE WALL INSULATION FOR HOT DRINKS – Durable coated ripple black design keeps drinks hot and comfortable to hold without the need for sleeves
PERFECT FOR TAKEAWAY & SMALL BUSINESSES – Ideal for cafés, coffee vans, pop-up stalls and small food outlets serving takeaway coffee and tea
BLACK DISPOSABLE CUPS FOR HOT DRINKS, MADE EASY – Convenient and reliable premium disposable cups designed for hot drinks on the go
STRONG, LEAK-RESISTANT COFFEE CUPS – Triple wall insulation provides strength and prevents leaks, ideal for takeaway hot drinks
COMPACT 8oz SIZE FOR SMALL COFFEES – Ideal size for flat whites, cappuccinos, americanos or tea, popular with coffee shops and takeaways nationwide
RECYCLABLE, ECO-CONSCIOUS PAPER CUPS – Made from responsibly sourced recyclable and biodegradable materials, helping reduce environmental impact
NO NEED FOR EXTRA CUP SLEEVES – The ripple insulation keeps drinks hotter for longer and your hands cool
IDEAL FOR EVENTS, PARTIES & HOME ENTERTAINING – These disposable cups are perfect for serving hot drinks at gatherings or casual events
TRUSTED BY BUSINESSES ACROSS THE UK – My Packaging proudly supplies high quality cups to cafés, takeaways, and food businesses nationwide
description: Looking for high-quality disposable cups for hot drinks that keep beverages hot, reduce waste and deliver a professional look? My Packaging’s 8oz Ripple Black Disposable Cups are trusted by cafés, takeaway shops, caterers and businesses across the UK for their strength, insulation, and eco-conscious design. These triple wall insulated ripple kraft black cups provide excellent heat retention while staying comfortable to hold — no need for extra sleeves or cup holders. Whether you're serving coffee, tea, hot chocolate or other hot drinks, these recyclable paper cups offer reliability and a premium appearance that reflects the quality of your business. Ideal for small coffee shops, takeaway counters, pop-up stalls, home use or casual events, our 8oz hot drinks cups provide the perfect portion size for flat whites, cappuccinos, americanos, tea or hot chocolate. Their sturdy, leak-resistant design ensures your customers enjoy their drinks without mess or compromise, whether it’s for takeaway coffee, parties or mobile catering. Crafted from responsibly sourced recyclable and biodegradable paper, these disposable cups for hot drinks help reduce environmental impact while maintaining durability and insulation for professional use. Supplied in a convenient, space-saving pack of 50, they’re easy to store and ready to use — perfect for small businesses, occasional use or party events. My Packaging is a trusted, family-owned UK supplier with over a decade of experience providing packaging to wholesalers, takeaway shops, restaurants, and businesses across the country. With a strong focus on quality, sustainability and customer service, we help businesses of all sizes serve their products with confidence.
